libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use the 2.0 API: DocumentRenderingContext replaces the old RenderingContext class, SkinResourceLoader is no longer public, DefaultSiteRenderer no longer has Plexus enableLogging, and SiteRenderingContext no longer has setUsingDefaultTemplate. Prefer obtaining SiteRenderer from a Plexus test container and render a small temporary site with a minimal skin/template and simple APT/XDoc/FML inputs rather than directly new-ing DefaultSiteRenderer for rendering paths.

deterministic_setup.reason: Upstream 2.0.0 renderer tests use @PlexusTest and PlexusContainer.lookup(SiteRenderer.class); DefaultSiteRenderer has private injected fields for Velocity, Doxia, ParserModuleManager, and PlexusContainer, so direct construction is not enough for rendering coverage.
The artifact declares maven-artifact as provided, but the public skin API uses Artifact/DefaultArtifact; standalone tests need it to exercise createContextForSkin and skin-related rendering behavior.
The 2.0.0 POM notes Doxia modules are no longer in doxia-core and must be declared so component descriptors are discovered; upstream rendering tests add the APT module in test scope.
The renderer normally locates and renders Doxia source formats through parser module descriptors; xdoc is an upstream test-scope parser module for site rendering coverage.
The renderer normally locates and renders Doxia source formats through parser module descriptors; fml is an upstream test-scope parser module for site rendering coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8134 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.doxia:doxia-site-renderer:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.9.1 tests fail because they target removed/renamed APIs, not because a Docker image or environment variable is missing.

If the generated tests avoid full document rendering and only cover context/resource helpers, some added parser-module dependencies may remain unused; local Gradle and Native Image verification should decide final scope.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: doxia-site-renderer 2.0.0 is a Maven/Plexus component whose meaningful rendering paths rely on injected components and Doxia parser modules that are not all present in the normal generated scaffold.
